message:
Fix delegate_cell min-duration init, marker_stream redaction flag, and dead code removal

Fix PerformanceMetrics in delegate_cell_harness to correctly initialize
min/max durations when the struct is default-constructed (zero min_duration_ns
edge case). Correct marker_stream RedactedPayload.redaction_applied to reflect
whether full_payload was actually present rather than unconditionally true.
Remove dead topological-sort in-degree computation from swarm_control_loop that
was calculated but never consumed. Add Serialize/Deserialize derives to
VersionMatrixError. Remove unused test helpers and imports across
module_async_evaluation, parser_frontier_evidence, and ts_normalization_evidence
integration tests. Update BindingType::Local -> BindingType::Direct in test
fixture.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@
 
 use frankenengine_engine::parser_frontier_evidence::{
     ActualParseOutcome, ExpectedParseOutcome, FrontierEvidenceArtifactPaths,
-    FrontierEvidenceBundleArtifacts, FrontierEvidenceEvent, FrontierEvidenceRunManifest,
+    FrontierEvidenceEvent, FrontierEvidenceRunManifest,
     FrontierSpecimen, FrontierSpecimenEvidence, FrontierVerdict, PARSER_FRONTIER_COMPONENT,
     PARSER_FRONTIER_EVENT_SCHEMA_VERSION, PARSER_FRONTIER_EVIDENCE_SCHEMA_VERSION,
     PARSER_FRONTIER_MANIFEST_SCHEMA_VERSION, PARSER_FRONTIER_POLICY_ID,
